ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the opponent */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the opponent name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent in the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week in which the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the game */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent in the game */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition during the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushings" (
  "rushing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the rushing statistic was recorded */,
  "total_rushes" INTEGER /* Total number of rushes in the game */,
  "total_rush_yards" INTEGER /* Total number of rushing yards in the game */,
  "rushing_epa" REAL /* Rushing EPA (Expected Points Added) in the game */,
  "rush_tds" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns in the game */,
  "rushing_first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of first downs rushed in the game */,
  "rushing_long" INTEGER /* Longest rush in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rushing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qb_rushings" (
  "qb_rushing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarterback rushing statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the quarterback rushing statistic was recorded */,
  "qb_rush_yards" INTEGER /* Number of rushing yards by the quarterback in the game */,
  "qb_rushing_epa" REAL /* Quarterback rushing EPA (Expected Points Added) in the game */,
  "qb_rush_tds" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns by the quarterback in the game */,
  "qb_rushing_first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of first downs rushed by the quarterback in the game */,
  "qb_rushing_long" INTEGER /* Longest quarterback rush in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qb_rushing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qb_rushings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rb_wins" (
  "rb_win_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each running back win statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the running back win statistic was recorded */,
  "rb_win" INTEGER /* Running back win in the game */,
  "rb_win_pred" INTEGER /* Predicted running back win in the game */,
  "rb_value" REAL /* Running back value in the game */,
  "rushing_value" REAL /* Rushing value in the game */,
  "qb_rushing_value_pct" REAL /* Quarterback rushing value percentage in the game */,
  "rb_win_percentage" REAL /* Running back win percentage in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rb_win_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rb_wins_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Name of the week */,
  "week_type" TEXT /* Type of week (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "start" TEXT /* Whether the player started the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the game */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the statistic is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the statistic is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "yards_rushed" INTEGER /* Total yards rushed by the player */,
  "yards_passed" INTEGER /* Total yards passed by the player */,
  "touchdowns_scored" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "touchdowns_passed" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns passed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_offense" INTEGER /* Total offense in the game */,
  "total_defense" INTEGER /* Total defense in the game */,
  "rushing_offense" INTEGER /* Rushing offense in the game */,
  "rushing_defense" INTEGER /* Rushing defense in the game */,
  "passing_offense" INTEGER /* Passing offense in the game */,
  "passing_defense" INTEGER /* Passing defense in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game that is a playoff game */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round the playoff game is in */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the playoff game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
